title: CONNECTIONS
sub: Every way the outside world reaches your agents — Telegram, Discord, email, CLI, schedule, MCP. Each connector is a self-contained dumb pipe: it carries a message to an agent and the reply back. One breaks, you fix only its folder.
install_hint: Drop a .fwpack (kind:channel). It validates, extracts to its own folder and hot-loads — no restart.
install_drop: Drag & drop, or click to choose a .fwpack
install_ok: ✅ installed {id} — set its token, then enable
empty: No connectors yet. Drop a .fwpack above, or copy templates/connector-template to build one.
uninstall_confirm: Uninstall {id}? Its folder — config and token included — will be deleted.
cfg_note: Stored only in this connector's own store — the token never leaves it.
cat_mcp: MCP — external tool servers for agents
mcp_install_hint: Paste the same mcpServers JSON you'd use in Claude Desktop. Its tools become available to ALL agents (uncheck per-agent later).
mcp_install_ok: ✅ installed {n} server(s) — tools registered for agents
mcp_empty: No MCP servers yet. Paste an mcpServers config above (e.g. github, filesystem).
